scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: ACT or SAT scores are required for first-year and transfer students; Stanford also says there are no minimum test scores required for admission.

claims.claim: ACT or SAT scores are required for first-year and transfer students.
